title: Checkpoint Naming Service Directory
description: This directory contains classes for generating unique checkpoint names in Hadoop MapReduce. The 'RandomNameCNS.java' file implements a strategy to produce random alphanumeric names prefixed with 'checkpoint_'. 'SimpleNamingService.java' generates names by appending 'checkpoint_' to an initial name. Both classes adhere to the 'CheckpointNamingService' interface, demonstrating the Strategy design pattern. This pattern allows for flexible and modular checkpoint naming strategies.

raw_response:
TITLE: Checkpoint Naming Service Directory

DESCRIPTION: This directory contains classes for generating unique checkpoint names in Hadoop MapReduce. The 'RandomNameCNS.java' file implements a strategy to produce random alphanumeric names prefixed with 'checkpoint_'. 'SimpleNamingService.java' generates names by appending 'checkpoint_' to an initial name. Both classes adhere to the 'CheckpointNamingService' interface, demonstrating the Strategy design pattern. This pattern allows for flexible and modular checkpoint naming strategies.
